name: French Fried Okra
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash okra and drain well.
2. Remove the tip and stem end; cut okra into 1/2 inch slices.
3. Sprinkle okra with salt.
4. Add buttermilk, stirring until well coated.
5. Let stand at least 15 minutes.
6. Drain okra well.
7. Dredge in cornmeal.
8. Deep fry okra in hot oil (375°F) until golden brown.
9. Drain on paper towels.
